tasks.prompt: Draw a cheerful coral rocket launching through a navy night sky, with one blue porthole and symmetrical fins.
Draw a friendly orange fox head icon with large triangular ears, a cream muzzle, and balanced dark eyes.
Draw a warm cream coffee mug with a teal handle, three simple steam curls, and a small leaf emblem.
Draw three celebratory balloons in coral, yellow, and blue with evenly spaced strings and a compact bow.
Draw a playful blue whale icon with a rounded body, small tail, white belly, and two water droplets above it.
Draw a tiny forest cabin at dusk with a red roof, glowing square window, one pine tree, and a crescent moon.
Adapt the supplied fox badge into cleaner, editable flat geometry while preserving the expression and orange-and-cream palette.
Adapt the supplied mug into a polished app icon with fewer shapes and consistent rounded outlines.
Rebuild the supplied plant as a balanced flat icon, keeping its three-leaf rhythm and terracotta pot.
Simplify the supplied lighthouse scene into a compact badge while preserving the striped tower, beam, sea, and sun.
Adapt the supplied sun-and-cloud mark into a cleaner weather icon with strong negative space.
Adapt the supplied fish into a simple aquatic icon while preserving its direction, fin placement, and coral accent.
